languages.text: {n}Мехадендрит Эоганна осторожно, почти нежно проводит по корпусу когитатора, испуская несколько гальванических вспышек.{/n} "Волей Бога-Машины, сей агрегат воспрял со смертного одра, Вольный Торговец. Будьте с ним деликатны".

{n}Eogunn's mechadendrite moves gently, almost tenderly, across the hull of the cogitator, releasing a few galvanic flashes.{/n} "The will of the Machine God has held back this device from the brink of death, Rogue Trader. Treat it gently."
languages.original_text: {n}Мехадендрит Эоганна осторожно, почти нежно проводит по корпусу когитатора, испуская несколько гальванических вспышек.{/n} "Волей Бога-Машины, сей агрегат воспрял со смертного одра, Вольный Торговец. Будьте с ним деликатны".

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn's mechadendrite moves gently, almost tenderly, across the hull of the cogitator, releasing a few galvanic flashes.{/n} "The will of the Machine God has stirred this device from the brink of death, Rogue Trader. Treat it gently."

{n}Eogunn's mechadendrite moves gently, almost tenderly, across the hull of the cogitator, releasing a few galvanic flashes.{/n} "The will of the Machine God has stirred this device from the brink of death, Rogue Trader. Treat it gently."

{n}Eogunn's mechadendrite moves gently, almost tenderly, across the hull of the cogitator, releasing a few galvanic flashes.{/n} "The will of the Machine God has held back this device from the brink of death, Rogue Trader. Treat it gently."

{n}Eogunn's mechadendrite moves gently, almost tenderly, across the hull of the cogitator, releasing a few galvanic flashes.{/n} "The will of the Machine God has held back this device from the brink of death, Rogue Trader. Treat it gently."

languages.text: {n}La mecadendrita se mueve con suavidad, casi con ternura, por la carcasa del cogitador emitiendo unos pocos destellos galvánicos.{/n} «La voluntad del Dios Máquina ha protegido al dispositivo de la muerte, Comerciante Independiente. Trátelo con delicadeza».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's mechadendrite moves gently, almost tenderly, across the hull of the cogitator, releasing a few galvanic flashes.{/n} "The will of the Machine God has held back this device from the brink of death, Rogue Trader. Treat it gently."

traits.locale_text: {n}La mecadendrita se mueve con suavidad, casi con ternura, por la carcasa del cogitador emitiendo unos pocos destellos galvánicos.{/n} «La voluntad del Dios Máquina ha protegido al dispositivo de la muerte, Comerciante Independiente. Trátelo con delicadeza».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡的机械触须动作轻柔，几乎是爱抚般地划过沉思者的外壳，释放出少许电流火花。{/n}“万机之神的意志将这台设备从死亡的边缘拉了回来，行商浪人。请对它温柔点。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's mechadendrite moves gently, almost tenderly, across the hull of the cogitator, releasing a few galvanic flashes.{/n} "The will of the Machine God has held back this device from the brink of death, Rogue Trader. Treat it gently."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡的机械触须动作轻柔，几乎是爱抚般地划过沉思者的外壳，释放出少许电流火花。{/n}“万机之神的意志将这台设备从死亡的边缘拉了回来，行商浪人。请对它温柔点。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunns Mechadendrit bewegt sich beinahe zärtlich über die Hülle des Cogitaors und setzt einige galavanische Blitze frei.{/n} "Der Wille des Maschinengottes hat dieses Gerät vor dem Tod bewahrt, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Behandelt es vorsichtig."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's mechadendrite moves gently, almost tenderly, across the hull of the cogitator, releasing a few galvanic flashes.{/n} "The will of the Machine God has held back this device from the brink of death, Rogue Trader. Treat it gently."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunns Mechadendrit bewegt sich beinahe zärtlich über die Hülle des Cogitaors und setzt einige galavanische Blitze frei.{/n} "Der Wille des Maschinengottes hat dieses Gerät vor dem Tod bewahrt, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Behandelt es vorsichtig."

languages.text: {n}La mécadendrite d'Eogunn effleure le boîtier de l'appareil avec une douceur confinant à la tendresse, libérant au passage quelques étincelles galvaniques.{/n} « C'est par la seule volonté du Dieu-Machine que ce dispositif conserve un semblant de vie, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Traitez-le avec les plus grands égards. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's mechadendrite moves gently, almost tenderly, across the hull of the cogitator, releasing a few galvanic flashes.{/n} "The will of the Machine God has held back this device from the brink of death, Rogue Trader. Treat it gently."

traits.locale_text: {n}La mécadendrite d'Eogunn effleure le boîtier de l'appareil avec une douceur confinant à la tendresse, libérant au passage quelques étincelles galvaniques.{/n} « C'est par la seule volonté du Dieu-Machine que ce dispositif conserve un semblant de vie, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Traitez-le avec les plus grands égards. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn'un mekadentriti; kavramsayarın gövdesi üzerinde nazikçe, neredeyse şefkatle hareket ederek birkaç galvaniz parıltı yayıyor.{/n} "Makine Tanrı'nın iradesi, bu cihazı ölümün eşiğinden döndürdü Hür Tacir. Ona nazik davranın."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's mechadendrite moves gently, almost tenderly, across the hull of the cogitator, releasing a few galvanic flashes.{/n} "The will of the Machine God has held back this device from the brink of death, Rogue Trader. Treat it gently."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn'un mekadentriti; kavramsayarın gövdesi üzerinde nazikçe, neredeyse şefkatle hareket ederek birkaç galvaniz parıltı yayıyor.{/n} "Makine Tanrı'nın iradesi, bu cihazı ölümün eşiğinden döndürdü Hür Tacir. Ona nazik davranın."

languages.text:
{n}エゴンの機械腕は、思考器の船体の上を、まるで優しく撫でるように滑り、数々の電気的な光を放つ。{/n}
「機械神様の意志が、この装置を死の淵から救った。ローグ・トレーダー、優しく扱え。」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's mechadendrite moves gently, almost tenderly, across the hull of the cogitator, releasing a few galvanic flashes.{/n} "The will of the Machine God has held back this device from the brink of death, Rogue Trader. Treat it gently."

「機械神様の意志が、この装置を死の淵から救った。ローグ・トレーダー、優しく扱え。」
